mapper.sql: SELECT d.device_id, d.device_status, d.battery_level, d.receive_date, d.dispatch_date, d.last_rental_date, d.last_as_date, d.device_specs, d.user_id, d.created_at, dm.model_id, dm.model_name, dm.version, dm.manual_url, dm.device_specs AS model_specs, b.branch_id, b.branch_name FROM device d JOIN device_model dm ON d.model_id = dm.model_id JOIN branch b ON d.branch_id = b.branch_id
mapper.select: WHERE d.branch_id = #{branchId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device (model_id, branch_id, device_status, battery_level, receive_date, dispatch_date, device_specs, user_id, center_id, created_at) VALUES (#{modelId}, #{branchId}, IFNULL(#{deviceStatus}, 0), IFNULL(#{batteryLevel}, 100), #{receiveDate}, #{dispatchDate}, #{deviceSpecs}, #{userId}, #{centerId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN device_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS in_stock, SUM(CASE WHEN device_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS renting, SUM(CASE WHEN device_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS as_received, SUM(CASE WHEN device_status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS as_completed, SUM(CASE WHEN device_status = 9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS discarded FROM device WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND branch_id = #{branchId} AND model_id = #{modelId}
mapper.update: UPDATE device SET device_status = #{deviceStatus} WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
UPDATE device SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
